mapper.sql: id, phone, code, scene, user_id, user_shard, device_id, device_type, ip, send_count, status, expire_time, use_time, verify_result, fail_reason, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sms_verification_codes WHERE phone = #{phone} AND scene = #{scene} AND status = 0 AND expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sms_verification_codes WHERE phone = #{phone} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sms_verification_codes WHERE ip = #{ip} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sms_verification_codes WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
mapper.update: UPDATE sms_verification_codes SET verify_result = #{verifyResult}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
